name: OpenAI Whisper Transcription
author: QUILL Team
description: Adds OpenAI Whisper as a cloud transcription provider. Audio is uploaded to OpenAI only when you explicitly transcribe with this provider and have configured an API key -- never offline, never without consent. The QUILL host performs the upload under the network-egress audit; the extension itself handles no audio bytes or keys.

transcription_providers.description: Cloud speech-to-text via OpenAI's Whisper API. High accuracy across 99+ languages; requires an OpenAI API key and per-use consent.
